commit.message:
fix: convert all page.evaluate to string-based IIFE to avoid esbuild __name bug

All 6 Playwright samples now use page.evaluate(\(() => { ... })()\) instead
of page.evaluate(() => { ... }). String-based evaluate bypasses esbuild's
keepNames transform which injects __name() calls that don't exist in the
browser context, causing ReferenceError at runtime.

Affected samples:
- gmail
- linkedin-monitor
- job-application-tracker
- real-estate-analyzer
- realtor-sales-package
- price-monitor

perf: monomorphic property load cache for PlainObject access

Add per-frame mono_load_cache HashMap<u32, (usize, JsValue)> that caches
property lookup results keyed by FeedbackSlot. On cache hit (same PropertyMap
pointer identity), the cached value is returned without a full proto_lookup
scan. Cache is invalidated on property store to the same object.

This gives most of the benefit of inline caches for hot property access
patterns without requiring the full IC architectural integration.

commit.message:
fix: enable SIMD instruction sets for NativeAOT publish

PublishAot=true with no InstructionSet caused the AOT compiler to
bake all feature checks above the x64 baseline (SSE2/SSE4.2/POPCNT)
to false at compile time. AVX, AVX2, FMA, BMI1, BMI2, LZCNT, and
AVX512F were dead-code-eliminated from the published binary.

Added InstructionSet property to both Host and CLI csproj files so
the AOT compiler emits multi-versioned code paths. IsSupported
checks are now true runtime guards instead of compile-time constants.

Also added raw CPUID detection to SimdCapabilities so the dashboard
can distinguish CPU-advertised vs runtime-enabled features when
diagnosing capability mismatches.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Per-ticker pipeline: indicators → VCP read → OHLCV → volume assessment → fundamentals → scoring → upsert

- VCP results read from same schema (no cross-context violation)
- Full audit trail: job_runs + job_run_items

- from_config() factory, injectable dependencies for testing

- Add mcsa_screen → McsaScreenJob to _REGISTRY
- CLI 'jobs list' now shows both vcp_screen and mcsa_screen
- CLI 'jobs run mcsa_screen nasdaq-100' resolves via same pattern

- mcsa_repository.py: get_latest_all, get_latest_by_ticker, get_range_by_ticker
- app.py: /mcsa/latest, /mcsa/latest/<ticker>, /mcsa/range
- Filterable by band, min_score; pagination support
- Follows existing VCP endpoint pattern (§6.1 ARCHITECTURE_RULES)

* test(mcsa): add unit tests for MCSA epic — 83 new tests

New test files:
- test_mcsa_scoring.py: scoring module, all 4 components, bands, missing data modes
- test_mcsa_volume_assessment.py: 3 volume signals, edge cases, lookback window

- test_mcsa_api_endpoints.py: /mcsa/latest, /mcsa/latest/<ticker>, /mcsa/range

Updated existing tests:

commit.message:
Optimize TLA+ model checking: add state constraint and symmetry reduction (#7)

The TLA+ model has unbounded counters (`dirty_gen`, `backing_version`)
that grow infinitely through `WriteAgain` and writer cycling, so TLC can
never fully explore the state space.

### Changes

- **State constraint** (`dirty_gen <= 3`): Bounds counter growth so TLC
terminates. 3 is sufficient for 2 concurrent writers to exercise all
generation-comparison branches.
- **Symmetry reduction** (`Permutations(Writers)`): Writers are
interchangeable — halves the state space.
- **Remove dead constant**: `NumReplWorkers` was declared but never
referenced.
- **Expand CI timeout**: 15 → 30 minutes for headroom.

### Result

TLC now completes full state graph exploration in ~4s: 297,678 distinct
states, depth 47, all invariants verified.

commit.message:
chore(renovate): fix automerge rules and reschedule lts cron (#1171)

## Summary

Two fixes to improve automation on the `main` branch and LTS release
schedule.

### Fix Renovate automerge rules (`.github/renovate.json5`)

The previous `packageRules` had gaps — GitHub Actions digest/version
updates and the Justfile `regex` manager were not covered by any
`automerge: true` rule, causing those PRs to require manual queue entry
even after approval.

Replaces 3 fragmented rules with 2 clean ones:
- All `digest`/`pin`/`pinDigest` updates get `automerge: true` across
all managers
- GitHub Actions `minor`/`patch` version bumps also get `automerge:
true`

### Reschedule LTS release cron

Changes the weekly LTS build trigger from Sunday 2 AM UTC to Tuesday 6
AM UTC (1 AM EST / 2 AM EDT).

commit.message:
Add MusicBrainz bulk match script for backfilling missing MBIDs (#338)

* Initial plan

* Add MusicBrainz bulk match script for finding/fixing missing MBIDs

New files:
- bin/musicbrainz-bulk-match.ts — main script (connects to Payload, queries collections, calls MusicBrainz API)
- bin/musicbrainz-bulk-match-utils.ts — shared types, CLI parsing, classification logic
- bin/musicbrainz-bulk-match.test.ts — 29 unit tests for utils

Supports: --collection, --fix, --verify, --limit flags
Added yarn musicbrainz:match script to package.json

Co-authored-by: tjnicolaides <1401894+tjnicolaides@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix musicbrainz:match script to use preload-nextenv-fix.mjs

Without the --import ./bin/preload-nextenv-fix.mjs flag, the script crashes
immediately with 'Cannot destructure property loadEnvConfig' due to the
known @next/env ESM/CJS interop issue. All other Payload CLI scripts
already use this preload.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix four issues with MusicBrainz bulk match script

1. Release search: use field-specific Lucene syntax (release:"title"
   AND artist:"name"), increase result limit from 5 to 10, lower score
   threshold from 85 to 75. Records matching improved from 0/28 to 10/28.

2. Verify mode: add 'verified' status for records whose existing MBID
   matches the API lookup, instead of silently classifying them as
   'skipped'. Shows ✔️ icon and counter in reports.

3. Replace deprecated getPayloadHMR with getPayload from 'payload'.

4. Add preload-nextenv-fix.mjs to the yarn script (already pushed in
   prior commit).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add encoding repair and fallback search to bulk match script

Encoding repair: detect and fix mojibake (UTF-8 decoded as Latin-1)
before searching. Recovers records like Poliça, Björk, Liberación.

Fallback search: when artist+title search returns nothing, retry with
title only. Catches misspelled artist names like Frank Ferdinand.

Records matching improved from 10/28 to 15/28.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
